# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Caching Workflow
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      # Cache node_modules for npm installs
      - name: Cache node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: '**/node_modules'
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-modules-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          
      # Cache pip packages for Python projects
      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: '**/venv'
          key: ${{ runner<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>runner.os }}-packages-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        
      # Cache any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run
      - name: Cache config files
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: './*'  # replace '*' with the specific file names or patterns you want to cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('./**') }}  # replace '**' with the same pattern as above
